forms_overview.description: This document contains all important forms for Morgan State University students. Forms are organized by category and include direct links for easy access.

steps: Go to Student Self-Service/WebSIS at https://lbpsso.morgan.edu/cas/login
Enter your Morgan State University email and click 'Continue'
Do NOT click 'Sign in with Google', 'Microsoft', or 'Apple'
Sign in with your MSU credentials on the landing page
Launch the Dashboard to access forms
how_to_access_websis_forms.note: You can track form submissions in WebSIS under 'Service Request' using the Smartsheet Dynamic View feature.

registrar_forms.description: Forms managed by the Office of the Registrar for enrollment, records, and academic requests.

current_student_forms.name: Change of Major/Minor/Concentration Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Request to change your major, minor, or concentration

current_student_forms.name: Change of Catalog Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Request to change to a different academic catalog year

current_student_forms.name: Excess Credit Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Request to take more than 18 credits in a semester

current_student_forms.name: Time Conflict Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Request approval for courses with overlapping schedules (requires both instructors' approval)

current_student_forms.name: Permission to Take Courses Off Campus
current_student_forms.purpose: Request approval to take courses at another institution

policy.core_courses: Core Computer Science courses must be taken on campus and are NOT eligible for off-campus credit
policy.seniors: Seniors are generally NOT allowed to take courses off-campus except under specific circumstances - discuss with department chair
policy.non_seniors: Non-seniors may pursue courses via articulation agreements - check form instructions

current_student_forms.name: Withdrawal/Cancellation Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Withdraw from courses or cancel enrollment

current_student_forms.name: Enrollment Verification Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Request official verification of your enrollment status

current_student_forms.name: FERPA Release Form
current_student_forms.purpose: Authorize release of educational records to specified individuals

current_student_forms.name: Personal Information Update Request
current_student_forms.purpose: Update legal name, date of birth, address, gender, or Social Security Number

current_student_forms.name: Exception to Enrollment Policy Appeal
current_student_forms.purpose: Appeal enrollment deadlines or policy exceptions

former_student_forms.name: Enrollment/Degree Verification Request
former_student_forms.purpose: Verify enrollment or degree for former students

former_student_forms.name: Exception to Enrollment Policy Appeal
former_student_forms.purpose: Appeal enrollment deadlines or policy exceptions

former_student_forms.name: Personal Information Update Request
former_student_forms.purpose: Update legal name, DOB, address, gender, SSN

transcripts_and_diplomas.name: Official Transcript Request
transcripts_and_diplomas.purpose: Order official transcripts to be sent to other institutions or employers

transcripts_and_diplomas.name: Unofficial Transcript
transcripts_and_diplomas.purpose: View or print your unofficial transcript

computer_science_department_forms.description: Forms specific to the Computer Science Department. Contact Ms. Wendy Smith for assistance.

forms.name: COSC Course Registration Override Request
forms.purpose: Request override for prerequisite or enrollment restrictions
forms.process: Contact your academic advisor to submit the request
forms.notes: Overrides are NOT guaranteed. The department chairperson's decision is final. Time-conflict overrides require approval from both instructors AND chairpersons.

forms.name: COSC Internal Course Substitution Request
forms.purpose: Request to substitute one course for another in your degree requirements
forms.process: Contact your academic advisor to submit the request

forms.name: COSC Advisor/Faculty Recommendation Request
forms.purpose: Request a recommendation letter from a CS faculty member

forms.name: COSC Action Conference Request
forms.purpose: Request a meeting/conference with department leadership

forms.name: Grade Appeal Form
forms.purpose: Appeal a grade you received in a course
forms.process: Contact Ms. Wendy Smith to obtain and submit the formal appeal form

scmns_forms.description: Forms for the School of Computer, Mathematical & Natural Sciences

forms.name: SCMNS Internship and Work Experience Form
forms.purpose: Report internship or work experience to your academic advisors

forms.name: SCMNS Academic Advising Form
forms.purpose: Complete before meeting with your advisor - ensures proper advising and timely registration

forms.name: SCMNS Academic Appeals Form
forms.purpose: Appeal decisions made by department chairpersons in SCMNS
forms.notes: The Department C.A.R.E.S. Form must be completed and reviewed by the Chairperson BEFORE completing the appeals form

advising_forms.description: Forms related to academic advising and student support

forms.name: Academic Advising Hotline Form
forms.purpose: Report advising concerns or request additional assistance
process: First attempt to resolve concerns directly with your assigned academic advisor
Allow 3 business days for advisor to respond

forms.name: Peer B.E.A.R.S. Mentee Application
forms.purpose: Apply to be matched with an upperclassman mentor (for freshmen)

graduate_student_forms.description: Forms for graduate students in the School of Graduate Studies

contact.location: Earl G. Graves Business Center, 4200 Hillen Road, Suite 401, Baltimore, MD 21218

forms.name: Appeal / Grievance Form
forms.purpose: Appeal grades or program-related matters to ensure fair treatment

forms.name: Extension of 5- or 7-Year Statute of Limitations
forms.purpose: Request time extension if you haven't completed your degree within the allowed window

forms.name: Leave of Absence Request
forms.purpose: Request temporary leave from the university

forms.name: Transfer of Credit Request
forms.purpose: Transfer credits from another institution to Morgan State

forms.name: Graduate Student Request to Take Undergraduate Course
forms.purpose: Request permission to take an undergraduate course (rare circumstances)

forms.name: Reinstatement of Past Course
forms.purpose: Restore previously taken courses to your schedule

financial_aid_forms.description: Forms required for financial aid applications and verification

forms_2026_2027.name: Verification (V1, V4, V5)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Federal verification of financial aid information

forms_2026_2027.name: Documentation of Legal Dependent (LDEPEN)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Document dependents for financial aid purposes

forms_2026_2027.name: Documentation of Citizenship (CITIZN)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Verify citizenship status for aid eligibility

forms_2026_2027.name: Satisfactory Academic Progress Appeal (APELF)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Appeal loss of financial aid due to SAP

forms_2026_2027.name: Dependency Override Request (DEPRE)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Request to be considered independent from parents

forms_2026_2027.name: Total and Permanent Disability Acknowledgement (TPD)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Acknowledge disability status for loan purposes

forms_2026_2027.name: Credit Evaluation Form (AUDIT)
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Request credit evaluation for financial aid

forms_2026_2027.name: Title IV Authorization Form
forms_2026_2027.purpose: Authorize use of Title IV funds

student_portals.description: Key online systems and portals for students

portals.name: WebSIS (Student Self-Service Banner)
portals.purpose: Register for classes, view grades, access financial aid records, manage personal information

portals.name: DegreeWorks
portals.purpose: Track degree progress, view completed/remaining requirements, plan courses

portals.name: Navigate360 (EAB)
portals.purpose: Schedule advising appointments, access academic support resources

portals.name: Parent Portal
portals.purpose: Family access to student information (with student authorization)

portals.name: Morgan Gateway
portals.purpose: Central hub for all Morgan State online services

portals.name: ScholarshipUniverse
portals.purpose: Find and apply for internal and external scholarships

tutoring_appointments.description: Links to schedule tutoring and academic support

resources.name: CASA (Center for Academic Success and Achievement)
Academic Enrichment Program (AEP)
resources.purpose: Tutoring, living and learning communities, leadership development

resources.name: Writing Center
resources.purpose: Writing assistance for all levels and disciplines
